aboutMe.description: I am a Full-Stack Developer based in Leipzig, Germany. After a decade in logistics, I transitioned to education, earning a Master's in Medical Physics, where I first got into programming with Python for data analysis. For the past two years I have been working professionally as a developer, and alongside that I run my own freelance business building websites end to end — from front-end to back-end. I am passionate about coding and committed to growing as a skilled, well-rounded programmer.
aboutMe.contactMe: If you think I'd be a good match for your projects, get in touch!

services.title: What I offer
services.intro: From a polished landing page to a full-blown web app — I build the whole thing, and I build it right.

card1.title: Modern websites
card1.text: Fast, responsive websites that are GDPR-compliant, accessible (WCAG) and meet today's web standards — looking sharp on every device.

card2.title: Full-stack web apps
card2.text: Custom software built end to end: Angular or React on the front, solid APIs and databases on the back — whatever your product needs.

card3.title: Code & consulting
card3.text: Reviews for performance, accessibility and code quality, plus ongoing maintenance to keep your existing site fast, secure and up to date.

portfolio.headerDescription: Explore a selection of my work here - Interact with projects to see my skills in action.

references.name: Join
references.description: Task manager inspired by the kanban system. Create and organize tasks with drag and drop functions, assign users and categories.

references.name: Sharkie
references.description: An underwater adventure game using an object-oriented approach. Guide Sharkie, collect poison, and defeat the giant shark.

references.name: PokéCubes
references.description: A web app using PokeAPI to display first-gen Pokémon on interactive, rotatable cubes. Click on a Pokémon for more info.
